prompt: Map the thermal colors onto the text, blending cold (blue) where letters start to hot (red) at the ends
prompt_refined: Edit Image 1. Apply a thermal color gradient to each letter of the 'Red Bull' text. Use Image 2 as a reference for the thermal color palette, where cold is blue and hot is red. For each individual letter, transition the color from cold blue at its left-most point to hot red at its right-most point.
objects: "Red Bull" text, with each letter displaying a gradient from blue on its left to red on its right
